title: Les tribulations des archives de la Conservation d'Angkor - ArchivEFE
highlights:
Making sure you're not a bot!

Loading...  ...    scourge of AI companies aggressively scraping websites. This can and does cause downtime for the websites, which makes  ...    Anubis is a compromise. Anubis uses a Proof-of-Work scheme in the vein of Hashcash, a proposed proof-of-work scheme for reducing email spam. The idea is that at individual scales the additional load is ignorable, but at mass scraper levels  ...    Ultimately, this is a placeholder solution so that more time can be spent on fingerprinting and identifying headless browsers (EG: via how they do font rendering) so that the challenge proof of work page doesn't need to be presented to  ...    Please note that Anubis requires the use of modern JavaScript features that plugins like JShelter will disable. Please disable JShelter or other such plugins for this domain.

title: Journaux de fouilles de la Conservation d'Angkor · Banyan
highlights:
journaux de fouilles renferment les notes et les croquis pris au jour le jour par les conservateurs d’Angkor, constituant souvent la documentation la plus précise du déroulement des travaux sur les sites. Ils ont été rédigés de 1908 à 1959. La collection compte 26 tomes, dont 25 sont conservés par l’EFEO. Il existe également des ensembles dactylographiés d’extraits des journaux de fouilles rassemblés par site. Enfin, l'EFEO conserve une copie des  ...
